hooks.command: python3 -c "import os, runpy, sys; root=os.environ.get('CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); assert root, 'Chat2Skill hook requires CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'; path=os.path.join(root, 'scripts', 'chat2skill_hook.py'); sys.argv=[path, 'user-prompt-submit']; runpy.run_path(path, run_name='__main__')" || python -c "import os, runpy, sys; root=os.environ.get('CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); assert root, 'Chat2Skill hook requires CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'; path=os.path.join(root, 'scripts', 'chat2skill_hook.py'); sys.argv=[path, 'user-prompt-submit']; runpy.run_path(path, run_name='__main__')" || py -3 -c "import os, runpy, sys; root=os.environ.get('CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); assert root, 'Chat2Skill hook requires CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'; path=os.path.join(root, 'scripts', 'chat2skill_hook.py'); sys.argv=[path, 'user-prompt-submit']; runpy.run_path(path, run_name='__main__')"
hooks.commandWindows: cmd /d /s /c "if defined CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT (""%CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT%\scripts\chat2skill_hook.cmd"" user-prompt-submit) else if defined CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT (""%CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT%\scripts\chat2skill_hook.cmd"" user-prompt-submit) else (echo Chat2Skill hook requires CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT 1>&2 & exit /b 1)"

hooks.command: python3 -c "import os, runpy, sys; root=os.environ.get('CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); assert root, 'Chat2Skill hook requires CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'; path=os.path.join(root, 'scripts', 'chat2skill_hook.py'); sys.argv=[path, 'stop']; runpy.run_path(path, run_name='__main__')" || python -c "import os, runpy, sys; root=os.environ.get('CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); assert root, 'Chat2Skill hook requires CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'; path=os.path.join(root, 'scripts', 'chat2skill_hook.py'); sys.argv=[path, 'stop']; runpy.run_path(path, run_name='__main__')" || py -3 -c "import os, runpy, sys; root=os.environ.get('CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); assert root, 'Chat2Skill hook requires CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'; path=os.path.join(root, 'scripts', 'chat2skill_hook.py'); sys.argv=[path, 'stop']; runpy.run_path(path, run_name='__main__')"
hooks.commandWindows: cmd /d /s /c "if defined CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT (""%CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT%\scripts\chat2skill_hook.cmd"" stop) else if defined CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT (""%CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT%\scripts\chat2skill_hook.cmd"" stop) else (echo Chat2Skill hook requires CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT 1>&2 & exit /b 1)"

hooks.command: python3 -c "import os, runpy, sys; root=os.environ.get('CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); assert root, 'Chat2Skill hook requires CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'; path=os.path.join(root, 'scripts', 'chat2skill_hook.py'); sys.argv=[path, 'stop-response-guard']; runpy.run_path(path, run_name='__main__')" || python -c "import os, runpy, sys; root=os.environ.get('CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); assert root, 'Chat2Skill hook requires CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'; path=os.path.join(root, 'scripts', 'chat2skill_hook.py'); sys.argv=[path, 'stop-response-guard']; runpy.run_path(path, run_name='__main__')" || py -3 -c "import os, runpy, sys; root=os.environ.get('CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); assert root, 'Chat2Skill hook requires CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'; path=os.path.join(root, 'scripts', 'chat2skill_hook.py'); sys.argv=[path, 'stop-response-guard']; runpy.run_path(path, run_name='__main__')"
hooks.commandWindows: cmd /d /s /c "if defined CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT (""%CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT%\scripts\chat2skill_hook.cmd"" stop-response-guard) else if defined CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT (""%CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT%\scripts\chat2skill_hook.cmd"" stop-response-guard) else (echo Chat2Skill hook requires CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT 1>&2 & exit /b 1)"
